metadata.description: Render claude.ai/design timeline animations to mp4 with the Web Audio soundtrack baked in

plugins.name: animation-to-mp4
plugins.description: Render a claude.ai/design Stage/Sprite timeline animation (animations.jsx plus a scene .jsx, usually wired through a .dc.html) to a real .mp4, with any procedural Web Audio soundtrack baked into the audio track. Asks for quality (original/1080p/4k), frame rate (24/30/60), and a platform aspect preset before rendering.
